contacts.title: Vox-Magos Distress
contacts.objective_update: Decide relay doctrine: secure transmission or purge saboteurs.

lines.speaker: Vox-Magos Hest
lines.text: Warp-static is tearing the relay loops apart. We have minutes before total silence.

lines.speaker: Loyalist Captain
lines.text: Then every minute is ours. Stabilize one mast and we drive the warning through it.

lines.speaker: Vox-Magos Hest
lines.text: A traitor cipher was found in maintenance channels. Saboteurs are onboard and moving for the relays.
